TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Tsou, story: TsouNr-frog-story-shi
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: uvo na maica ci ha'o ucia paehohamo ta mo maica.
S.PHON: uvo ns msiʦs ʦi hsʔo uʦis psehohsmo ts mo msiʦs.
S.FORM: uvo na maica ci ha'o ucia paehohamo ta mo maica.
S.PHON: uvo ns msiʦs ʦi hsʔo uʦis psehohsmo ts mo msiʦs.
S.TRANSL: 他們竟然要我講故事.

TRANSL.notes: Unexpectedly, (they) want me to tell a story.

S.TRANSL: Unexpectedly, want me to tell a story.

S.FORM: ehng te'o n'a ahtu n'a ehohamo maitan'e.
S.PHON: ehŋ teʔo nʔs shtu nʔs ehohsmo msitsnʔe.
S.FORM: ehng te'o n'a ahtu n'a ehohamo maitan'e.
S.PHON: ehŋ teʔo nʔs shtu nʔs ehohsmo msitsnʔe.
S.TRANSL: 我今天難得來講故事.
Rarely, I will tell a story today.

S.FORM: ehng moso la cihi ci oko ho mo con ci av'u moso la aʉ aʉt'ʉcʉ to aʉt'ʉcʉ to mo conci fok'unge yon ta'e meihua te'o engha te ake'i ʉmnʉ ci yaei.
S.PHON: ehŋ moso ɗs ʦihi ʦi oko ho mo ʦon ʦi svʔu moso ɗs sɨ sɨtʔɨʦɨ to sɨtʔɨʦɨ to mo ʦonʦi fokʔuŋe jon tsʔe meihus teʔo eŋhs te skeʔi ɨmnɨ ʦi jsei.
S.FORM: ehng moso la cihi ci oko ho mo con ci av'u moso la aʉ aʉt'ʉcʉ to aʉt'ʉcʉ to mo conci fok'unge yon ta'e meihua te'o engha te ake'i ʉmnʉ ci yaei.
S.PHON: ehŋ moso ɗs ʦihi ʦi oko ho mo ʦon ʦi svʔu moso ɗs sɨ sɨtʔɨʦɨ to sɨtʔɨʦɨ to mo ʦonʦi fokʔuŋe jon tsʔe meihus teʔo eŋhs te skeʔi ɨmnɨ ʦi jsei.
S.TRANSL: 一個男孩和一隻狗養了一隻青蛙.梅花,我稍微比較好講話.

TRANSL.notes: A boy and a dog raised a frog. Meihua, I'm somewhat easily moved (to tell a story).

S.TRANSL: A boy and a dog raised a frog. Meihua, I'm somewhat easily moved .

W.TRANSL: 助動.未來-第一人稱單數.屬格

S.FORM: i'o mo con ci oko ho i'o mo eh ieh mo maezo aʉt'ʉcʉ ta mo con coni ci av'u.
S.PHON: iʔo mo ʦon ʦi oko ho iʔo mo eh ieh mo msezo sɨtʔɨʦɨ ts mo ʦon ʦoni ʦi svʔu.
S.FORM: i'o mo con ci oko ho i'o mo eh ieh mo maezo aʉt'ʉcʉ ta mo con coni ci av'u.
S.PHON: iʔo mo ʦon ʦi oko ho iʔo mo eh ieh mo msezo sɨtʔɨʦɨ ts mo ʦon ʦoni ʦi svʔu.
S.TRANSL: 一個小孩養了一隻狗.
A boy raised a dog.

S.FORM: ehm ah mo moso la noepohʉa 'e av'u ho oko moso la aʉt'ʉcʉ to fo'kunge.
S.PHON: ehm sh mo moso ɗs noepohɨs ʔe svʔu ho oko moso ɗs sɨtʔɨʦɨ to foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: ehm ah mo moso la noepohʉa 'e av'u ho oko moso la aʉt'ʉcʉ to fo'kunge.
S.PHON: ehm sh mo moso ɗs noepohɨs ʔe svʔu ho oko moso ɗs sɨtʔɨʦɨ to foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 那男孩和狗一起養了一隻青蛙.
The boy and the dog raised a frog together.

S.FORM: moso alʉhi mohcu noana'o feungna noana'o feungna ne moso la oengʉtʉ manci s'a.
S.PHON: moso sɗɨhi mohʦu nosnsʔo feuŋns nosnsʔo feuŋns ne moso ɗs oeŋɨtɨ msnʦi sʔs.
S.FORM: moso alʉhi mohcu noana'o feungna noana'o feungna ne moso la oengʉtʉ manci s'a.
S.PHON: moso sɗɨhi mohʦu nosnsʔo feuŋns nosnsʔo feuŋns ne moso ɗs oeŋɨtɨ msnʦi sʔs.

TRANSL.notes: 一天晚上,已經很晚了,(人們)都睡了.

S.TRANSL: 一天晚上,已經很晚了, 都睡了.

TRANSL.notes: One night, it was very late when (people) had slept.

S.TRANSL: One night, it was very late when had slept.

S.FORM: ohe la 'so teapha to pania to mo.
S.PHON: ohe ɗs ʔso tesphs to psnis to mo.
S.FORM: ohe la 'so teapha to pania to mo.
S.PHON: ohe ɗs ʔso tesphs to psnis to mo.

TRANSL.notes: (他)怎麼會把(青蛙)放進去瓶子裡.

S.TRANSL: 怎麼會把 放進去瓶子裡.

TRANSL.notes: Why (did he) put (the frog) in a container?

S.TRANSL: Why put in a container?

S.FORM: to mo c'o okosi ongayo to mo isi.
S.PHON: to mo ʦʔo okosi oŋsjo to mo isi.
S.FORM: to mo c'o okosi ongayo to mo isi.
S.PHON: to mo ʦʔo okosi oŋsjo to mo isi.
S.TRANSL: 瓶口就只有這麼小而已.
The bottle neck is so small.

S.FORM: temza peelʉi enca hu eh te av'an av'a no kokugo.
S.PHON: temzs peeɗɨi enʦs hu eh te svʔsn svʔs no koku*o.
S.FORM: temza peelʉi enca hu eh te av'an av'a no kokugo.
S.PHON: temzs peeɗɨi enʦs hu eh te svʔsn svʔs no koku*o.

TRANSL.notes: (那個)用國語怎麼說?

S.TRANSL: 用國語怎麼說?

TRANSL.notes: How do (people) say that in Mandarin?

S.TRANSL: How do say that in Mandarin?

S.FORM: av'a no cou 'e sin 'e pania.
S.PHON: svʔs no ʦou ʔe sin ʔe psnis.
S.FORM: av'a no cou 'e sin 'e pania.
S.PHON: svʔs no ʦou ʔe sin ʔe psnis.
S.TRANSL: 用鄒語怎麼講那個瓶子是...

TRANSL.notes: How do (people) describe the bottle in Tsou?

S.TRANSL: How do describe the bottle in Tsou?

S.FORM: uN isi peelʉi hupaezuma ci pania.
S.PHON: un isi peeɗɨi hupsezums ʦi psnis.
S.FORM: uN isi peelʉi hupaezuma ci pania.
S.PHON: un isi peeɗɨi hupsezums ʦi psnis.
S.TRANSL: 那個瓶子是可以看穿的瓶子.
The bottle is the bottle which can be seen through.

S.FORM: eh mohcu oengʉtʉ ne moso noana'o feʉngna oengʉtʉ ne moso noana'o feʉngna manci mohcu 'so maezo oengʉtʉ si av'u i'o av'u ci ihe aʉt'ʉca isi aʉt'ʉca ta oko ci av'u.
S.PHON: eh mohʦu oeŋɨtɨ ne moso nosnsʔo feɨŋns oeŋɨtɨ ne moso nosnsʔo feɨŋns msnʦi mohʦu ʔso msezo oeŋɨtɨ si svʔu iʔo svʔu ʦi ihe sɨtʔɨʦs isi sɨtʔɨʦs ts oko ʦi svʔu.
S.FORM: eh mohcu oengʉtʉ ne moso noana'o feʉngna oengʉtʉ ne moso noana'o feʉngna manci mohcu 'so maezo oengʉtʉ si av'u i'o av'u ci ihe aʉt'ʉca isi aʉt'ʉca ta oko ci av'u.
S.PHON: eh mohʦu oeŋɨtɨ ne moso nosnsʔo feɨŋns oeŋɨtɨ ne moso nosnsʔo feɨŋns msnʦi mohʦu ʔso msezo oeŋɨtɨ si svʔu iʔo svʔu ʦi ihe sɨtʔɨʦs isi sɨtʔɨʦs ts oko ʦi svʔu.
S.TRANSL: 一天晚上,夜已經很深了,男孩睡了,狗也跟著睡了.就是小孩子所養的狗.

TRANSL.notes: One evening, (the boy) went to sleep. The dog went to bed with him-- the dog which he raises.

S.TRANSL: One evening, went to sleep. The dog went to bed with him- the dog which he raises.

S.FORM: manci s'a yuyafo 'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: msnʦi sʔs jujsfo ʔo foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: manci s'a yuyafo 'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: msnʦi sʔs jujsfo ʔo foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 那青蛙怎麼會跑出來?
Why did the frog come out?

S.FORM: mohcu pkaako mi to ngayo to pania 'o 'o fo'kunge ho pkaako.
S.PHON: mohʦu pkssko mi to ŋsjo to psnis ʔo ʔo foʔkuŋe ho pkssko.
S.FORM: mohcu pkaako mi to ngayo to pania 'o 'o fo'kunge ho pkaako.
S.PHON: mohʦu pkssko mi to ŋsjo to psnis ʔo ʔo foʔkuŋe ho pkssko.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙已經從瓶口跑掉了.
The frog had escaped from the mouth of the container.

S.FORM: ohe cu 'so micu 'so yʉc'ʉ 'e oko.
S.PHON: ohe ʦu ʔso miʦu ʔso jɨʦʔɨ ʔe oko.
S.FORM: ohe cu 'so micu 'so yʉc'ʉ 'e oko.
S.PHON: ohe ʦu ʔso miʦu ʔso jɨʦʔɨ ʔe oko.
S.TRANSL: 這小孩起來了.
The child rose.

S.FORM: ihe cu isi cu ake'a isi cu cohivi ho mo pkaako av'u i'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: ihe ʦu isi ʦu skeʔs isi ʦu ʦohivi ho mo pkssko svʔu iʔo foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: ihe cu isi cu ake'a isi cu cohivi ho mo pkaako av'u i'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: ihe ʦu isi ʦu skeʔs isi ʦu ʦohivi ho mo pkssko svʔu iʔo foʔkuŋe.

TRANSL.notes: 然後他們就稍微... 他已經知道狗....(不,是)青蛙跑掉了.

S.TRANSL: 然後他們就稍微... 他已經知道狗.... 青蛙跑掉了.

TRANSL.notes: And they just somewhat ... He knew that dog, (no, it's) the frog escaped.

S.TRANSL: And they just somewhat ... He knew that dog, the frog escaped.

S.FORM: micu maezo nac'o si av'usi isi 'so aiti 'o fo'kunge micu uk'a na 'a lasi no 'so na.
S.PHON: miʦu msezo nsʦʔo si svʔusi isi ʔso siti ʔo foʔkuŋe miʦu ukʔs ns ʔs ɗssi no ʔso ns.
S.FORM: micu maezo nac'o si av'usi isi 'so aiti 'o fo'kunge micu uk'a na 'a lasi no 'so na.
S.PHON: miʦu msezo nsʦʔo si svʔusi isi ʔso siti ʔo foʔkuŋe miʦu ukʔs ns ʔs ɗssi no ʔso ns.
S.TRANSL: 小狗覺得很難過因為青蛙逃走了.
The dog felt very sad, because it saw the frog escaped.

S.FORM: na'na ʉmnʉa ta av'u 'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: nsʔns ɨmnɨs ts svʔu ʔo foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: na'na ʉmnʉa ta av'u 'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: nsʔns ɨmnɨs ts svʔu ʔo foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 狗也很喜歡那隻青蛙.
The dog also liked the frog very much.

S.FORM: micu nac'o icu i'poepoha i'eima ta oko ho ta av'u 'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: miʦu nsʦʔo iʦu iʔpoepohs iʔeims ts oko ho ts svʔu ʔo foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: micu nac'o icu i'poepoha i'eima ta oko ho ta av'u 'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: miʦu nsʦʔo iʦu iʔpoepohs iʔeims ts oko ho ts svʔu ʔo foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 小狗很難過,就跟小孩一起找青蛙.
It felt very sad, and went to look for the frog together with the boy.

S.FORM: isi 'so aka ucia ta'totothomʉneni ta av'u 'o fo'kunge ho eainca mo s'a yonenu.
S.PHON: isi ʔso sks uʦis tsʔtotothomɨneni ts svʔu ʔo foʔkuŋe ho esinʦs mo sʔs jonenu.
S.FORM: isi 'so aka ucia ta'totothomʉneni ta av'u 'o fo'kunge ho eainca mo s'a yonenu.
S.PHON: isi ʔso sks uʦis tsʔtotothomɨneni ts svʔu ʔo foʔkuŋe ho esinʦs mo sʔs jonenu.
S.TRANSL: 狗一直在想青蛙跑到哪裡去了.
The dog kept on thinking where the frog had gone.

S.FORM: ta'una'na moso yon ta pania.
S.PHON: tsʔunsʔns moso jon ts psnis.
S.FORM: ta'una'na moso yon ta pania.
S.PHON: tsʔunsʔns moso jon ts psnis.
S.TRANSL: 狗心想青蛙本來在瓶子裡.

TRANSL.notes: The dog thought that (the) from stayed in the bottle.

S.TRANSL: The dog thought that from stayed in the bottle.

S.FORM: isi cu 'so payuoyo ta pania ta av'u 'o fnguusi.
S.PHON: isi ʦu ʔso psjuojo ts psnis ts svʔu ʔo fŋuusi.
S.FORM: isi cu 'so payuoyo ta pania ta av'u 'o fnguusi.
S.PHON: isi ʦu ʔso psjuojo ts psnis ts svʔu ʔo fŋuusi.
S.TRANSL: 狗把頭伸進去瓶子裡.
The dog made its head enter into the container.

S.FORM: isi fnguusi ho eainca te'o n'a a'ʉmta ala esansana mio nana aʉmtʉ alʉ pkaako ta pania.
S.PHON: isi fŋuusi ho esinʦs teʔo nʔs sʔɨmts sɗs essnssns mio nsns sɨmtɨ sɗɨ pkssko ts psnis.
S.FORM: isi fnguusi ho eainca te'o n'a a'ʉmta ala esansana mio nana aʉmtʉ alʉ pkaako ta pania.
S.PHON: isi fŋuusi ho esinʦs teʔo nʔs sʔɨmts sɗs essnssns mio nsns sɨmtɨ sɗɨ pkssko ts psnis.
S.TRANSL: 狗想說我想要確定的找一下它是不是真的從瓶子裡跑掉.
The dog thought that I have to make sure and find whether it was really gone.

S.FORM: isi cu 'so hooyoeveni ta yoni to fo'ku yoni to fo'kunge 'e 'o fnguu to av'u manci 'so cʉnghʉ.
S.PHON: isi ʦu ʔso hoojoeveni ts joni to foʔku joni to foʔkuŋe ʔe ʔo fŋuu to svʔu msnʦi ʔso ʦɨŋhɨ.
S.FORM: isi cu 'so hooyoeveni ta yoni to fo'ku yoni to fo'kunge 'e 'o fnguu to av'u manci 'so cʉnghʉ.
S.PHON: isi ʦu ʔso hoojoeveni ts joni to foʔku joni to foʔkuŋe ʔe ʔo fŋuu to svʔu msnʦi ʔso ʦɨŋhɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 狗把頭伸入(原來)青蛙在的(瓶子)裡,沒想到頭卡住了.

S.TRANSL: 狗把頭伸入 青蛙在的 裡,沒想到頭卡住了.

TRANSL.notes: The dog inserted it head into (the container) where the frog (used to) stay.

S.TRANSL: The dog inserted it head into where the frog stay.

S.FORM: cu o'tena peelʉi le o'tena peelʉi empuisi ta fnguu ta sʉngʉsi yon eh i'o ngayo to pania msi isi cu c'o asʉngʉca haahafa si.
S.PHON: ʦu oʔtens peeɗɨi ɗe oʔtens peeɗɨi empuisi ts fŋuu ts sɨŋɨsi jon eh iʔo ŋsjo to psnis msi isi ʦu ʦʔo ssɨŋɨʦs hsshsfs si.
S.FORM: cu o'tena peelʉi le o'tena peelʉi empuisi ta fnguu ta sʉngʉsi yon eh i'o ngayo to pania msi isi cu c'o asʉngʉca haahafa si.
S.PHON: ʦu oʔtens peeɗɨi ɗe oʔtens peeɗɨi empuisi ts fŋuu ts sɨŋɨsi jon eh iʔo ŋsjo to psnis msi isi ʦu ʦʔo ssɨŋɨʦs hsshsfs si.
S.TRANSL: 狗沒有辦法把在瓶頸的頭從瓶口拉出來.
The dog can't take pull its head at the neck of the bottle from the mouth of the bottle.

S.FORM: i'o osi yoni to fo'kunge ci pania.
S.PHON: iʔo osi joni to foʔkuŋe ʦi psnis.
S.FORM: i'o osi yoni to fo'kunge ci pania.
S.PHON: iʔo osi joni to foʔkuŋe ʦi psnis.
S.TRANSL: 牠就隨身帶著青蛙住的那個瓶子.
It just always carried the bottle where the frog lived.

S.FORM: eh m 'a isiz 'a isi no 'so peelʉi hucaefiza ko'ko a eN en amcu mo aʉlʉ eainca o'te bohngʉ isi c'o n'a asngʉca peelʉi teolʉi 'o isi mia.
S.PHON: eh m ʔs isiz ʔs isi no ʔso peeɗɨi huʦsefizs koʔko s en en smʦu mo sɨɗɨ esinʦs oʔte ɓohŋɨ isi ʦʔo nʔs ssŋɨʦs peeɗɨi teoɗɨi ʔo isi mis.
S.FORM: eh m 'a isiz 'a isi no 'so peelʉi hucaefiza ko'ko a eN en amcu mo aʉlʉ eainca o'te bohngʉ isi c'o n'a asngʉca peelʉi teolʉi 'o isi mia.
S.PHON: eh m ʔs isiz ʔs isi no ʔso peeɗɨi huʦsefizs koʔko s en en smʦu mo sɨɗɨ esinʦs oʔte ɓohŋɨ isi ʦʔo nʔs ssŋɨʦs peeɗɨi teoɗɨi ʔo isi mis.

TRANSL.notes: 因為(瓶子)是可以看穿的,所以牠還不會看不到東西,還是可以看到他所走的路.

S.TRANSL: 因為 是可以看穿的,所以牠還不會看不到東西,還是可以看到他所走的路.

TRANSL.notes: Because (the container) was transparent, the dog still could see the path it walked.

S.TRANSL: Because was transparent, the dog still could see the path it walked.

S.FORM: micu cʉng casngʉcʉ cʉnghʉ ta fnguu ta av'u si pania ho.
S.PHON: miʦu ʦɨŋ ʦssŋɨʦɨ ʦɨŋhɨ ts fŋuu ts svʔu si psnis ho.
S.FORM: micu cʉng casngʉcʉ cʉnghʉ ta fnguu ta av'u si pania ho.
S.PHON: miʦu ʦɨŋ ʦssŋɨʦɨ ʦɨŋhɨ ts fŋuu ts svʔu si psnis ho.
S.TRANSL: 瓶子一直卡在狗的頭.
The dog got its head stuck in the container.

S.FORM: ho mo yuyuso si si oko ho 'i'ima 'o ohe payoa ci fo'kunge.
S.PHON: ho mo jujuso si si oko ho ʔiʔims ʔo ohe psjos ʦi foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: ho mo yuyuso si si oko ho 'i'ima 'o ohe payoa ci fo'kunge.
S.PHON: ho mo jujuso si si oko ho ʔiʔims ʔo ohe psjos ʦi foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 小狗和小孩一起找青蛙.
The dog looked for the lost frog together with the boy.

S.FORM: ohe la aʉt'ʉca ci fo'kunge na'no ma'na'nac'o ho mimimio to fʉengu ho bibimi mimimio to fʉengu ho 'i'ima 'o ohe la aʉt'ʉca ci fo'kunge.
S.PHON: ohe ɗs sɨtʔɨʦs ʦi foʔkuŋe nsʔno msʔnsʔnsʦʔo ho mimimio to fɨeŋu ho ɓiɓimi mimimio to fɨeŋu ho ʔiʔims ʔo ohe ɗs sɨtʔɨʦs ʦi foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: ohe la aʉt'ʉca ci fo'kunge na'no ma'na'nac'o ho mimimio to fʉengu ho bibimi mimimio to fʉengu ho 'i'ima 'o ohe la aʉt'ʉca ci fo'kunge.
S.PHON: ohe ɗs sɨtʔɨʦs ʦi foʔkuŋe nsʔno msʔnsʔnsʦʔo ho mimimio to fɨeŋu ho ɓiɓimi mimimio to fɨeŋu ho ʔiʔims ʔo ohe ɗs sɨtʔɨʦs ʦi foʔkuŋe.

TRANSL.notes: (他們想到青蛙)心裡很難過,就在山裡走一走一起尋找他們以前養的青蛙.

S.TRANSL: 心裡很難過,就在山裡走一走一起尋找他們以前養的青蛙.

S.TRANSL: They went to look for their pet frog in the mountains. They were very distressed
